models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Enable models, manage providers, and set a default for chat requests.
models.signInHint: Log in to sync models from OpenBrain and choose a canonical model ID.
models.builtinManaged: Managed by your OpenBrain session. Use Refresh to sync the built-in catalog.

openBrain.title: OpenBrain
openBrain.subtitle: Choose the default Brain provider and configure local GBrain when needed.
openBrain.cloudHint: Default. Uses your signed-in OpenBrain account and cloud Brain database.
openBrain.localHint: Use a local GBrain install, database, or remote MCP endpoint.
openBrain.signInHint: Cloud Brain is the out-of-box default. Sign in to list, create, and search your cloud sources.
openBrain.remoteMcpClientSecretPlaceholder: Use env var or paste client secret
openBrain.savedLoginRequired: OpenBrain settings saved. Sign in to use Cloud Brain.

desktop.title: Desktop
desktop.subtitle: Configure desktop app behavior.
desktop.idleSleepOffHint: Use your system power settings as usual.
desktop.idleSleepWhileAgentRunningHint: Keep the system awake only during active chat streams, commands, and similar agent work. The display can still lock.
desktop.idleSleepWhileAppRunningHint: Keep the system awake for the whole app session so local server and runtime stay available. The display can still lock. Useful when using OpenBrain as a hub for remote surfaces.
